# Falk Michel

> Fullstack TypeScript tech lead based in Munich, building software and supporting infrastructure for the mobility industry. AI-assisted, but with 12+ years of pre-AI experience and a focus on user-centric solutions.

## About

Falk Michel is a fullstack TypeScript tech lead based in Munich with over 12 years of experience building software. He works at an international full-service agency in their Mobility and Professional Services department, building products for some of the biggest names in the German automotive and mobility industry. He focuses on industry best practice, structural thinking, and solutions that stay user-centric — because they're built for humans.

## Services

- [Web Development](https://falkmichel.com/services/web-development): Custom web applications that solve a real problem — configurators, dashboards, internal tools, customer portals.
- [Fullstack Development (TS)](https://falkmichel.com/services/fullstack-development-ts): End-to-end product engineering — UI, API, database, deployment — owned by one person so the pieces actually agree with each other.
- [CMS Websites](https://falkmichel.com/services/cms-websites): Websites where marketing and editors update content themselves — fast, accessible, SEO-solid. Headless CMS, modern frontend, sane content model.
- [AI Integration](https://falkmichel.com/services/ai-integration): Hands-on AI adoption for development teams — in your real codebase, not in slides. Guidelines, habits, and the judgement of when not to use AI.
- [Rapid Prototyping](https://falkmichel.com/services/rapid-prototyping): From idea to clickable, working prototype in days. Built with production-grade tools, so the idea that survives doesn't have to start over.
- [Figma Plugin Development](https://falkmichel.com/services/figma-plugin-development): Custom Figma plugins that remove repetitive manual work, keep design tokens in sync with code, and bridge Figma to your internal systems.
- [Payment Integrations](https://falkmichel.com/services/payment-integrations): Stripe, LemonSqueezy, PayPal, and Shopify done right — for online shops that can't afford a broken checkout or a 3-week debug session over webhook signatures.

## Blog

- [The Art of Asking](https://falkmichel.com/blog/the-art-of-asking): The agentic trap curve, Deep Thought, and why knowing what to ask for matters more than knowing how to build it.
- [The Art of Asking Pt. 2](https://falkmichel.com/blog/the-art-of-asking-pt-2): Complex tickets, fading shame, and why asking AI to explain a problem is the same skill as asking it to solve one.
- [The Case for CLIs in the Agentic Age](https://falkmichel.com/blog/the-case-for-clis-in-the-agentic-age): AI agents are better at Unix commands than at clicking buttons. That has consequences for how we build tools.
- [Agents Are the Next Browser](https://falkmichel.com/blog/agents-are-the-next-browser): In two years, a third of your comparison traffic will come from AI assistants, not Google. Your website needs an agent-facing interface.

## Technical

- Built with: TanStack Start, React 19, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Vite
- Languages: English, German, Spanish
